How it works

Take control of
your money.

01
Download the free money kit

AI prompts for budgeting, saving and planning your finances — plus the 10 money habits that actually work.

02
Pick one habit to start

Don't try everything at once. Pick the habit that solves your biggest financial pain right now. Most people start with the 50/30/20 rule.

03
Get the weekly newsletter

Every week: one money habit, one AI tool for your finances, one action step. Practical, honest, no financial jargon.

AI Finance Prompt
Help me build a 50/30/20 budget
ChatGPT helps you
"My monthly take-home is [£X]. Split into 50% needs, 30% wants, 20% savings."copy
"List my likely needs vs wants based on [your situation]."copy
"What should I automate first to stick to this budget?"copy
